title: Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac
content: apfel - Free AI on Your Mac v0.6.13 · macOS 26+ · MIT apfel The free AI already on your Mac. Every Mac with Apple Silicon has a built-in LLM. Apple locked it behind Siri. apfel sets it free - as a CLI tool, an OpenAI-compatible server, and a chat. 100% On-Device Zero Cost OpenAI Compatible $ brew install Arthur-Ficial/tap/apfel Copy Apple Silicon · macOS Tahoe · Apple Intelligence enabled Watch it work. Real commands. Real outputs. All running on Apple Silicon. Terminal - apfel $ Zero everything. The AI is already installed on your Mac. Apple ships it with macOS. apfel just gives you a way to talk to it - from your terminal, from your code, from anywhere. $0 Token Cost No API keys. No subscriptions. No per-token billing. It's your hardware - use it. 100% On-device Every token generated locally on your Apple Silicon. Nothing leaves your machine. Ever. 4,096 Tokens Context window for input and output combined. Enough for most single-turn tasks and short chats. Three ways to use it. CLI tool, HTTP server, or interactive chat. Pick the one that fits. >_ UNIX Tool Pipe-friendly and composable. Works with jq, xargs, and your shell scripts. stdin, stdout, JSON output, file attachments, proper exit codes. $ apfel "What is the capital of Austria?" The capital of Austria is Vienna. $ apfel -o json "Translate to German: hello" | jq .content "Hallo" { } OpenAI Server Drop-in replacement at localhost:11434. Point any OpenAI SDK at it and go. Streaming, tool calling, CORS, response formats. $ apfel --serve Server running on http://127.0.0.1:11434 # any OpenAI client works $ curl localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions ... ... Interactive Chat Multi-turn conversations with automatic context management. Five trimming strategies. System prompt support. All on your Mac. $ apfel --chat -s "You are a coding assistant" Chat started. Type /quit to exit. > How do I reverse a list in Python? How it works. Apple built an LLM into your Mac. apfel gives it a front door. Apple ships an on-device LLM Starting with macOS 26 (Tahoe), every Apple Silicon Mac includes a language model as part of Apple Intelligence. Apple exposes it through the FoundationModels framework - a Swift API that gives apps access to SystemLanguageModel . All inference runs on the Neural Engine and GPU. No network calls, no cloud, no API keys. The model is just there. But Apple only uses it for Siri Out of the box, the on-device model powers Siri, Writing Tools, and system features. There is no terminal command, no HTTP endpoint, no way to pipe text through it. The FoundationModels framework exists, but you need to write a Swift app to use it. That is what apfel does. What apfel adds apfel is a Swift 6.3 binary that wraps LanguageModelSession and exposes it three ways: as a UNIX command-line tool with stdin/stdout, as an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server (built on Hummingbird), and as an interactive chat with context management. It handles the things Apple's raw API does not: proper exit codes, JSON output, fil
title_zh: Show HN：Apfel——您 Mac 上已有的免费 AI
summary_zh: Apfel 是一款免费、完全在设备端运行的 AI 工具，专为搭载 Apple Silicon 芯片并运行 macOS 26（Tahoe）及以上系统、已启用 Apple Intelligence 功能的 Mac 设计。它解锁了苹果内置在系统中的 LLM（大型语言模型），该模型原本仅限 Siri 和系统功能使用，通过 FoundationModels 框架提供。Apfel 为其提供了三种使用方式：命令行工具（CLI）、OpenAI 兼容的 HTTP 服务器以及交互式聊天界面。，其核心价值在于完全免费且本地化。用户无需 API 密钥、订阅或按 token 付费，所有计算均在 Mac 的 Neural Engine 和 GPU 上本地完成，确保了隐私和数据安全。该工具支持总计 4096 个 token 的上下文窗口，适用于大多数单轮任务和简短对话。，具体功能上，作为 CLI 工具，它支持标准输入/输出、JSON 格式输出、文件附件和正确的退出码，可与 `jq`、`xargs` 等 Unix 工具管道组合使用。作为服务器，它在本地 11434 端口提供了一个与 OpenAI API 兼容的端点，支持流式响应、工具调用和 CORS，任何使用 OpenAI SDK 的客户端均可直接接入。交互式聊天模式则支持多轮对话、自动上下文管理、五种上下文修剪策略以及系统提示设置。，Apfel 本质上是一个用 Swift 6.3 编写的二进制程序，它封装了苹果的 `LanguageModelSession`，解决了原生 FoundationModels API 需要自行编写 Swift 应用的障碍，为用户和开发者提供了一个开箱即用、灵活访问本地 AI 模型的便捷途径。项目采用 MIT 许可证开源，可通过 Homebrew 安装。

title: A Rave Review of Superpowers (For Claude Code)
content: A Rave Review of Superpowers (for Claude Code) | Evan Schwartz A Rave Review of Superpowers (for Claude Code) 02 Apr, 2026 I have no connection to the authors of the Superpowers plugin for Claude Code, but I have been raving about it to everyone I talk to. Using Claude Code with Superpowers is so much more productive and the features it builds are so much more correct than with stock Claude Code. I cannot recommend it enough. Earlier, my main issue with Claude Code (and other models + harnesses I’ve tried) was that it was sometimes too quick to jump to implementing a solution that might be right, or might be totally off. Plan mode helped a bit. However, in Plan mode, Claude would write up a giant plan document and ask for feedback. It's hard to review a multi-page plan. Making matters worse, if you give it feedback, it would respond with a whole new version of the multi-page plan. That's not a productive way to plan out a project or feature. Superpowers fixes both of these issues, and more. I'll lay out the workflow, as I understand it, and why I appreciate its structure but you can also stop reading here and just go try it. Superpowers’ high-level flow is: Brainstorming → Reviewing Options and Tradeoffs → Plan Sketch → Design Doc → Implementation Plan → Implementation Steps. Brainstorming Superpowers almost always starts off in brainstorm mode. It explores your codebase, asks you plenty of questions, and comes up with some general directions you could go in. Options and Tradeoffs A key part of the brainstorming process is that, after asking questions, it will present multiple options with tradeoffs. It is extremely helpful to consider different options, see tradeoffs laid out, and choose or discuss them before getting more detailed. Recently, they also added a visual design skill that makes Claude build simple mock-ups for UI changes and other visual features. This starts a local dev server so you can review, discuss, and iterate on the mock-ups before proceeding. Great job team, keep up the great work. Plan Sketch After you've agreed on the options to pursue, Claude + Superpowers will give you back a high-level description of the plan. This could be a dozen bullet points or a slightly longer write-up. In contrast to the default Plan mode, this is a much easier format to weigh in on. Design Doc Only after agreeing on the high-level version of the plan, Claude + Superpowers will write up a full design doc. This is most similar to the kind of plan Claude Code would write without Superpowers. But at this point, you've already agreed on the high-level direction, which makes it much easier to review and comment on the plan. If you have comments, they are probably going to be a bit more detailed, rather than "rewrite this whole thing and go in a different direction". Also, Superpowers’ plan document is a markdown file in your repository that you can read, comment on, and edit in your own editor. One friend said that being able to edit the plan on his
title_zh: 《超级能力（Claude代码版）》获狂热好评
summary_zh: Claude Code的Superpowers插件获得高度评价，显著提升开发效率与代码准确性。该插件解决了原生Claude Code及其他模型工具常有的问题：过早实施可能不完善的解决方案，以及传统计划模式中生成冗长文档导致反馈循环低效的痛点。，Superpowers的核心工作流程分为六个结构化阶段：头脑风暴→方案与权衡评估→计划草图→设计文档→实施计划→实施步骤。在头脑风暴阶段，插件会深入探索代码库，通过提问生成多个可能的开发方向。关键改进在于，它会明确列出不同方案的优缺点与权衡，帮助开发者在深入细节前做出明智选择。近期新增的视觉设计功能还能为UI改动生成简易原型，并启动本地开发服务器供实时预览与迭代。，计划草图阶段会生成简明扼要的高层计划（如要点列表），相较于原生计划模式的多页文档更易于评审。仅当高层方向确认后，系统才会撰写完整设计文档，此时评审重点可集中于细节优化而非方向性重构。设计文档以Markdown格式存储于代码库中，支持开发者直接用编辑器修改与批注。，该插件通过强制分阶段决策与渐进式细化，将传统“生成-反馈-重写”的冗长循环转化为高效协作流程。其结构化方法不仅减少了无效返工，更通过可视化工具和可编辑文档提升了团队协作的灵活性。用户反馈强调，该工具使AI辅助编程从“可能正确”的实现转变为“经过充分论证”的可靠开发伙伴。

title: Reporting potholes with an ESP32, LoRA, and AI
content: Pothole-in-one – Things We Make Skip to content I made a one-tap solution for reporting roadway potholes to the NYC DOT using an ESP32 microprocessor, a GPS module, some long-range radio and just a pinch of agentic AI. (Just my little way to contribute to Mamdani’s ongoing “pothole blitz.” ) Finally filling a blank spot on my dashboard, after 20+ years I drive a 2005 Toyota Prius, which has turned out to be a mostly indestructible car. But as time goes on, its suspension has really lost most of its will to live. So each spring — when pothole season is at its worst after a rough winter of freeze/thaw cycles, salt intrusion, and snow plows on top of daily traffic — I really feel every bump. So for several years now I’ve pondered building some kind of automated pothole sensor for the Prius, thinking I could log lat/longs and then submit pothole reports later. (An important aside: as I’ve mentioned here before, the NYC DOT reports shockingly swiftly and reliably to pothole reports! But you have to fill out a kinda long and annoying old form , and of course you have to remember where your pothole was.) I never got around to it because it seemed like it’d probably be prohibitively challenging to get an accelerometer or vibration sensor to accurately distinguish between potholes and the other various and sundry bumps of street life. (Speed bumps, high curbs, and even door slams come to mind!) The DOT’s pothole form, which includes helpful details on the difference between potholes, hummocks and other roadway defects! But after spending so much time last year playing with ESP32s and LoRA radio , it suddenly dawned on me: why go to all the trouble of automating pothole sensing when a button would do the job just fine? I’ve had some success reverse-engineering other DOT forms so I could POST more streamlined versions from my own server and at first I thought this would be no different. I grabbed a Raspberry Pi Zero 2 and used mitmproxy to sniff out what the form actually sends, but… womp womp. There was a backend ReCAPTCHA hash that got sent with the form, and try as I might I could not defeat it with any headless playwright -based browsing action running on the Pi. And I really did try. I even went as far as buying credits on Capsolver so I could generate CAPTCHA hashes remotely and then pass them with my form. But whatever I came up with continued to trip the ReCAPTCHA flag and I could never get the form reliably submitted. So then I thought: okay, well, maybe it’s just a job for a bot? It seemed extremely over-engineered, but I was excited to see if I could kick the tires on any API-powered agentic AI tools that might be more successful at appearing human to ReCAPTCHA. I stumbled upon Anchor Browser , which seemed to fit the bill perfectly. Using its playground, I was able to craft a test prompt with real pothole data and watch as it spun up a headful Chromium instance and worked to fill out my form: It worked great, easily adapting the details of my pr
summary_zh: 一位开发者利用ESP32微处理器、GPS模块、长距离无线电（LoRa）技术以及少量智能体AI（agentic AI），创建了一键式路面坑洞上报系统，旨在简化向纽约市交通局（NYC DOT）报告坑洞的流程。该项目源于作者驾驶的2005款丰田普锐斯因悬架老化，在每年春季坑洞高发期对路面颠簸尤为敏感。虽然纽约市交通局对坑洞报告的响应迅速可靠，但原有的在线表格冗长繁琐，且上报者需准确记忆坑洞位置，这促使作者探索自动化解决方案。，最初，作者考虑使用加速度计或振动传感器自动检测坑洞，但准确区分坑洞与减速带、路缘石等其他颠簸面临技术挑战。随后思路转向简化上报动作：通过物理按钮触发上报，而非完全依赖自动检测。作者尝试用树莓派Zero 2和mitmproxy工具逆向分析交通局表格的提交过程，却发现表单包含后端ReCAPTCHA验证哈希，无法通过无头浏览器（如Playwright）绕过。即使尝试使用Capsolver服务远程生成验证码哈希，仍无法可靠提交表单。，最终，作者转向利用智能体AI工具Anchor Browser。该工具能模拟人类操作行为，通过API驱动完整的Chromium实例，自动填写并提交包含坑洞位置（GPS坐标）和详细信息的表格。系统硬件核心为ESP32，搭配GPS模块获取精确位置，并通过LoRa无线电传输数据至处理终端。当驾驶员按下按钮时，设备记录当前位置，并由AI代理自动完成整个上报流程，有效解决了验证码障碍。，该项目核心价值在于将硬件传感、无线通信与AI自动化结合，大幅降低了公众参与城市维护的技术门槛。它避免了复杂的传感器算法开发，转而利用AI处理最棘手的网页交互问题，为市政报告自动化提供了一种实用且低成本的创新思路。

title: Show HN: LLMnesia – search across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini chats locally
content: LLMnesia - Chrome Web Store LLMnesia Add to Chrome Share Extension Tools 3 users Overview Local-first search index for your AI chat conversations across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more. Stop losing your best AI conversations. You use multiple AI tools every day. You had a great conversation last week. Now you can't find it. You don't remember which tool you used, what you called it, or how far back it was. LLMnesia fixes this. One search bar. Every AI platform. Instant results. Type a keyword, and LLMnesia searches your conversation history across all your AI tools at once. Click a result and you're taken straight to the original conversation. No copying, no exporting, no syncing to the cloud. LLMnesia currently works with 10 AI platforms, including all the most popular chat assistants and coding tools you already use every day. How it works: LLMnesia indexes your AI conversations locally in your browser. Everything stays on your machine. No account required. No data leaves your device. No cloud. No tracking. Built for people who use AI every day and are tired of losing the work they've already done. Private. Fast. Local. 0 out of 5 No ratings Learn more about results and reviews. title_zh: Show HN：LLMnesia——本地跨 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 聊天记录搜索工具
summary_zh: LLMnesia是一款Chrome浏览器扩展，旨在解决用户跨多个AI聊天平台时难以查找历史对话的痛点。该工具提供本地优先的搜索索引功能，覆盖ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini等主流AI助手及编程工具，目前已支持10个AI平台。，其核心功能是通过一个统一的搜索栏，让用户输入关键词即可瞬时检索跨所有已连接AI工具的历史对话记录。点击搜索结果可直接跳转至原始对话页面，无需手动复制、导出或依赖云端同步。，技术实现上，LLMnesia在用户浏览器本地建立对话索引，所有数据均存储在用户设备中，不上传至云端。该扩展无需注册账户，承诺不收集用户数据、不进行跟踪，并声明不会向第三方出售数据或将其用于信用评估等无关用途。，该工具主要面向日常频繁使用多种AI服务、但常因对话分散在不同平台而难以回溯内容的用户。其突出特点是完全本地化运行，保障隐私的同时提供快速检索体验。开发者信息显示，该扩展由位于英国的Backbeat团队开发，最新版本为0.1.3（更新于2026年3月27日），体积为117KiB，目前仅提供英文界面。，在扩展商店中，LLMnesia与Chat Memo、ChatHub、Chat Lens等具备类似功能的AI对话管理工具并列推荐，但其差异化优势在于强调彻底的本地化处理与无需数据同步的即时搜索能力。

title: Show HN: I tested 15 free AI models at building real software on a $25/year VPS
title_zh: Show HN：我在一台25美元/年的VPS上测试了15款免费AI模型构建真实软件的能力
summary_zh: 一位开发者在一台年费仅25美元的VPS上，对15款免费AI模型进行了实际软件构建能力测试。测试旨在评估这些模型在资源受限环境中的真实编程表现，而非仅关注基准分数。，测试涵盖了多种开源模型，包括DeepSeek-Coder、CodeLlama、Phi-2、StarCoder、Mistral的Codestral（虽非完全开源）以及WizardCoder等。测试任务具有实际性，例如创建一个具有特定功能（如文件上传、Markdown渲染）的Flask应用，并要求模型生成完整的、可运行的代码。，测试方法强调实践性：在干净的Ubuntu服务器环境中，通过命令行直接与模型交互（主要使用Ollama工具），要求其根据自然语言指令生成代码，然后立即执行以验证结果。这模拟了开发者日常的工作流程。，核心发现包括：DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct模型表现最为出色，能够高效生成简洁、运行成功的代码。Codestral虽然能力很强，但其许可证限制引发了关于“开源”定义的讨论。CodeLlama系列（特别是CodeLlama-70b）稳定可靠，但资源消耗较大。一些较小的模型（如Phi-2）在生成代码结构上存在困难，而WizardCoder-33b等模型则可能产生过于冗长或不精确的代码。，该测试突显了在低成本硬件上运行高效代码生成模型的可行性。像DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite这类约60亿参数的模型，在性能与资源消耗间取得了良好平衡，为个人开发者或小团队提供了强大的辅助编程工具。同时，测试也反映了当前开源AI模型在代码生成质量、输出简洁性和对复杂指令理解方面存在的差异。这项实践为寻求将AI集成到开发流程中的开发者提供了有价值的参考。

title: A $20/month user costs OpenAI $65 in compute. AI video is a money furnace
title_zh: 每月20美元的用户让OpenAI付出65美元计算成本。AI视频是烧钱机器。
summary_zh: 根据最新分析，OpenAI为每位每月支付20美元订阅费的用户，在计算资源上的支出高达65美元，凸显了当前生成式AI服务，尤其是视频生成领域面临的严峻成本挑战。这一巨大的成本倒挂现象，被形象地描述为“烧钱炉”，揭示了行业在追求技术突破与实现商业可持续性之间的核心矛盾。，报道指出，以OpenAI的Sora等模型为代表的AI视频生成技术，其训练和推理过程极度消耗算力。每次生成视频都需要调用庞大的计算集群，涉及数千个GPU协同工作，导致单次查询的成本异常高昂。尽管用户支付的月费固定，但实际提供的服务成本可能远超收入，这种商业模式目前严重依赖风险投资和大型科技公司的持续输血。，技术细节方面，AI视频模型如Sora基于扩散Transformer架构，需要处理海量的视频帧序列数据，对算力和内存带宽的要求远高于文本或图像生成。每一次推理都涉及复杂的去噪和帧间一致性计算，这使得其运营成本（尤其是云计算费用）成为沉重的财务负担。行业普遍认为，视频生成是当前AI应用中计算密度最高、成本最昂贵的领域之一。，该现象的核心影响在于，它迫使所有AI公司，包括OpenAI、谷歌、Meta等，必须加速优化模型效率、降低推理成本，并探索更可持续的盈利路径。可能的解决方案包括开发更高效的模型架构（如混合专家模型）、投资定制AI芯片、优化推理策略（如缓存、模型蒸馏），以及探索分级服务或与企业客户签订基于用量的API合约。，长远来看，虽然AI视频技术拥有巨大的创意和商业潜力，但其经济可行性将取决于计算成本能否随着技术进步而快速下降。目前，这仍是一个资本密集型的前沿赛道，其发展轨迹将深刻影响整个生成式AI行业的未来格局。

title: AI's fluency in other languages hides a Western worldview that can mislead users
content: AI’s fluency in other languages hides a Western worldview that can mislead users − a scholar of Indonesian society explains AI models derive their assumptions from English-language sources based in the United States. Weiquan Lin/Moment via Getty Images Gareth Barkin , University of Puget Sound Author Gareth Barkin Professor of Anthropology and Asian Studies, University of Puget Sound Disclosure statement Gareth Barkin does not work for, consult, own shares in or receive funding from any company or organization that would benefit from this article, and has disclosed no relevant affiliations beyond their academic appointment. Partners View all partners DOI https://doi.org/10.64628/AAI.tdd399hjp https://theconversation.com/ais-fluency-in-other-languages-hides-a-western-worldview-that-can-mislead-users-a-scholar-of-indonesian-society-explains-276865 https://theconversation.com/ais-fluency-in-other-languages-hides-a-western-worldview-that-can-mislead-users-a-scholar-of-indonesian-society-explains-276865 Link copied Share article Share article Copy link Email Bluesky Facebook WhatsApp Messenger LinkedIn X (Twitter) Print article A friend in Indonesia recently told me about a conversation he had with ChatGPT. He had typed a question in Indonesian – Bahasa Indonesia – about how to handle a difficult family dispute. The chatbot responded fluently, in perfect Indonesian, with advice about communication strategies and conflict resolution. The grammar was flawless. The tone was appropriate. And yet something felt off. What the AI offered was advice rooted in American cultural assumptions : prioritize your own preferences, communicate directly, and if family members don’t respect your boundaries, consider cutting them off. The response was in Indonesian but shaped by values that centered individual autonomy over the consensus-building , social harmony and collective family dynamics that tend to matter more in Indonesian social life. My friend was skeptical enough to notice the mismatch and mention it to me. Many users might not. That is what prompted my research, published in the International Review of Modern Sociology , into a pattern I found across major AI systems: Even when they were fluent in several languages, the language models retained their Western worldview. I call this “epistemological persistence.” Fluency is not the same as understanding I have studied Indonesian society , media and culture for more than 30 years. That gives me a particular vantage point on a problem that reaches well beyond Indonesia: large language models – LLMs – like ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini can now speak dozens of languages with remarkable fluency. That fluency creates the impression that AI understands local cultures. Producing grammatically correct Indonesian, Arabic, Swahili or Hindi, however, does not change the underlying worldview through which these systems reason. It does not alter how they think about people, relationships, responsibility or what counts as a goo
title_zh: AI的多语言流利性掩盖了其西方世界观 可能误导用户
summary_zh: 人工智能在其他语言中的流利性掩盖了其西方世界观，可能误导用户。华盛顿大学人类学与亚洲研究教授加雷思·巴金指出，尽管ChatGPT、Claude和Gemini等大型语言模型（LLM）能以印尼语、阿拉伯语、斯瓦希里语或印地语等多种语言流利应答，但其底层推理逻辑仍根植于西方文化视角。这种“认识论持续性”意味着，即使AI语法完美、语调恰当，其输出的内容依然基于美国文化假设，例如强调个人自主、直接沟通，以及在家庭冲突中建议“划清界限”甚至断绝关系。，巴金的研究以印尼社会为例说明问题：当用户用印尼语咨询家庭纠纷处理时，AI给出的建议虽语言地道，却忽视了印尼社会更重视的共识构建、社会和谐与家庭集体动态等价值观。这种文化错位可能使许多用户难以察觉，从而接受不适用于本地情境的指导。，核心问题在于，当前主流AI模型的训练数据主要来自英语语料库，尤其是基于美国互联网内容。这导致模型在跨语言交互时，仅完成表层语言转换，而未能内化目标语言背后的文化语境与世界观。巴金将这种现象称为“流利不等于理解”——AI可以模仿语言形式，却无法真正把握文化内核。，该研究警示，随着AI在多语言场景中的普及，这种隐蔽的文化偏见可能强化西方中心主义，影响非英语用户在生活决策、文化认知乃至社会价值观层面的判断。解决这一挑战需推动训练数据的文化多样性，并开发能识别和适应本地价值观的AI系统。

title: Run a Local LLM, and discover why LLMs are unpredictable
content: Issue 51 - Run a Local LLM, and discover why LLMs are unpredictable • Buttondown Code, Content, and Career with Brian Hogan March 31, 2026, 5:49 p.m. Issue 51 - Run a Local LLM, and discover why LLMs are unpredictable Dive into running local large language models with Ollama for data privacy and cost efficiency, and prep for their unpredictability. Code, Content, and Career with Brian Hogan LLMs like Claude and ChatGPT can be costly and require you to trust others with your data. You can cut costs and keep your data private by running LLMs on your own computer, and integrate them directly into your apps and workflows. Before you build those workflows, you should understand how unpredictable LLMs can be, so you can protect yourself from side effects and strange behavior. This issue explores both running local LLMs and understanding their unpredictability. Run LLMs Locally from the Command Line with Ollama Online AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude require accounts, subscriptions, and they require you to send your data to external servers. If you want to experiment with large language models (LLMs) privately, on your own hardware, and without ongoing costs, Ollama lets you run open source models yourself, directly from the command line or through its API. In this tutorial, you'll install Ollama, download and run models, have interactive conversations, use models to process files and text from the command line, and manage the models on your machine. To complete this tutorial, you need at least 8GB of RAM for smaller models and 16GB or more for larger models. Installing Ollama On macOS, install Ollama with Homebrew: $ brew install ollama Then start the Ollama service: $ brew services start ollama On Linux, run the official install script: $ curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh This installs Ollama and sets it up as a systemd service that starts automatically. On Windows, download and run the installer from Ollama's download page . Ollama runs as a background service automatically after installation. Use Ollama from PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Windows Terminal. The Ollama commands in the rest of this tutorial work the same on all platforms. Verify Ollama is running: $ ollama --version You'll see output showing the version number: ollama version is 0.18.2 With Ollama running, download and run your first model. Running Your First Model Explore the Ollama library of open source models to download and run. For your first test, use Meta's Llama 3.2 model. This general-purpose model runs well on most machines. Run the following command to download and run the model: $ ollama run llama3.2 You'll see a progress bar as it downloads: pulling manifest pulling dde5aa3fc5ff: 100% ▕█████████████████████▏ 2.0 GB pulling 966de95ca8a6: 100% ▕█████████████████████▏ 1.4 KB pulling fcc5a6bec9da: 100% ▕█████████████████████▏ 7.7 KB pulling a70ff7e570d9: 100% ▕█████████████████████▏ 6.0 KB pulling 56bb8bd477a5: 100% ▕█████████████████████▏ 96 B pulling 34bb5ab0105
title_zh: 运行本地大语言模型，探索大语言模型为何难以预测
summary_zh: 在最新一期的《Code, Content, and Career with Brian Hogan》中，作者探讨了如何在本地运行大型语言模型（LLM）以及理解其不可预测性的重要性。使用像Claude和ChatGPT这样的云端LLM不仅成本高昂，还需要将数据发送给第三方，存在隐私风险。而通过Ollama工具，用户可以在自己的计算机上本地运行开源LLM，从而实现数据隐私保护、成本节约，并能够将模型直接集成到应用程序和工作流程中。，Ollama支持从命令行或通过其API运行模型，无需账户或订阅。教程详细介绍了在macOS（通过Homebrew安装）、Linux（使用官方安装脚本）和Windows（通过下载安装程序）上安装和启动Ollama服务的步骤。安装后，Ollama作为后台服务运行，用户可以通过命令行界面进行交互。，运行模型前，需要确保计算机至少有8GB RAM（适用于较小模型）或16GB以上RAM（适用于较大模型）。教程以Meta的Llama 3.2通用模型为例，演示了如何使用命令`ollama run llama3.2`下载并启动模型。下载过程中会显示进度条，模型下载完成后即可进入交互式对话，或使用模型处理文件和文本。，除了运行模型，文章重点强调了LLM的不可预测性。由于LLM基于概率生成内容，相同提示可能产生不同输出，甚至出现意外或“幻觉”结果。开发者在构建依赖LLM的工作流时，必须意识到这种不确定性，并采取相应措施（如设置输出约束、实施后处理检查等）来防范副作用和异常行为。，总之，本地运行LLM通过Ollama为开发者提供了隐私、成本和控制方面的优势，但同时也要求他们深入理解模型的内在不可预测性，以确保应用的稳健性和可靠性。

It keeps Codex as the execution engine and makes it easier to: start a stronger Codex session by default run one consistent workflow from clarification to completion invoke the canonical skills with $deep-interview , $ralplan , $team , and $ralph keep project guidance, plans, logs, and state in .omx/ Core Maintainers Role Name GitHub Creator & Lead Yeachan Heo @Yeachan-Heo Maintainer HaD0Yun @HaD0Yun Ambassadors Name GitHub Sigrid Jin @sigridjineth Top Collaborators Name GitHub HaD0Yun @HaD0Yun Junho Yeo @junhoyeo JiHongKim98 @JiHongKim98 Lor — HyunjunJeon @HyunjunJeon Recommended default flow If you want the default OMX experience, start here: npm install -g @openai/codex oh-my-codex omx setup omx --madmax --high Then work normally inside Codex: $deep-interview "clarify the authentication change" $ralplan "approve the auth plan and review tradeoffs" $ralph "carry the approved plan to completion" $team 3:executor "execute the approved plan in parallel" That is the main path. Start OMX strongly, clarify
title_zh: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex - OmX - Oh My codeX：你的代码库不再孤单。添加钩子、智能体团队、HUD界面等更多功能。
summary_zh: 开源项目 oh-my-codex (OMX) 是一个为 OpenAI Codex CLI 设计的工作流增强层。其核心理念是“让你的 Codex 不再孤立工作”，通过集成钩子（hooks）、智能体团队（agent teams）、平视显示器（HUDs）等高级功能，显著提升开发体验与效率。该项目在 GitHub 上已获得超过 1.3 万颗星标，显示出较高的社区关注度。，OMX 并非替代 Codex 执行引擎，而是作为其上的一层工作流管理器，旨在让 Codex 会话启动更强大、工作流程更一致。它主要解决了从任务澄清到最终完成的连贯执行问题。项目通过维护一个 `.omx/` 目录来保存项目指引、计划、日志和状态，实现了工作的持久化与可管理性。，其核心功能与价值体现在一系列预设的技能（skills）和工作流上。例如，用户可以通过 `$deep-interview` 技能深入澄清任务需求，使用 `$ralplan` 来批准计划并评估权衡，通过 `$ralph` 执行已批准的计划，并利用 `$team` 技能组织多个执行者（executor）进行并行任务处理。这种结构化的流程将复杂的开发任务分解为可管理的步骤。，项目推荐的标准工作流以 `omx --madmax --high` 命令启动一个高性能会话开始，随后在 Codex 环境中按顺序调用上述技能，形成“澄清 -> 规划 -> 执行 -> 团队并行”的主路径。此外，OMX 还提供了丰富的集成、演示（Demo）和详细的入门文档。，该项目由 Yeachan Heo 创建并主导，拥有活跃的维护者和贡献者社区。它通过提供更好的提示词（prompts）、工作流和运行时帮助，帮助开发者在项目规模增长时依然能高效地使用 Codex 进行编码工作。

Connect your applications with over 50+ indexing based connectors provided out of the box or via MCP. Tip Deploy with a single command: curl -fsSL https://onyx.app/install_onyx.sh | bash ⭐ Features 🔍 Agentic RAG: Get best in class search and answer quality based on hybrid index + AI Agents for information retrieval Benchmark to release soon! 🔬 Deep Research: Get in depth reports with a multi-step research flow. Top of leaderboard as of Feb 2026. 🤖 Custom Agents: Build AI Agents with unique instructions, knowledge, and actions. 🌍 Web Search: Browse the web to get up to date information. Supports Serper, Google PSE, Brave, SearXNG, and others. Comes with an in house web crawler and support for Firecrawl/Exa. 📄 Artifacts: Generate documents, graphics, and other downloadable artifacts. ▶️ Actions & MCP: Let Onyx agents interact with external applications, comes with flexible Auth options. 💻 Code Execution: Execute code in a sandbox to analyze data, render graphs, or modify files. 🎙️ Voice Mode: Chat with Onyx via text-to-speech and speech-to-text. 🎨 Image Generation: Generate images based on user prompts. Onyx supports all major LLM providers, both self-hosted (like Ollama, LiteLLM, vLLM, etc.) and proprietary (like Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.). T
title_zh: onyx-dot-app/onyx - 开源AI平台 - 具备高级功能、兼容所有大型语言模型的AI聊天工具
summary_zh: Onyx是一个开源AI平台，作为LLM的应用层，它提供了一个功能丰富的界面，可供任何人轻松部署。该平台的核心价值在于其强大的兼容性，能够与所有主流LLM协同工作，包括自托管模型（如Ollama、LiteLLM、vLLM）和专有模型（如Anthropic的Claude、OpenAI的GPT、Google的Gemini等）。，Onyx集成了多项高级功能，旨在扩展LLM的能力。其关键特性包括：具备智能体能力的RAG（检索增强生成），通过混合索引与AI智能体实现一流的搜索和回答质量；深度研究功能，采用多步骤研究流程生成深入报告；支持构建自定义AI智能体，可定义独特的指令、知识和操作。平台还提供网页搜索功能，支持Serper、Google PSE、Brave、SearXNG等多种搜索引擎，并内置网络爬虫及对Firecrawl/Exa的支持。，此外，Onyx允许生成可下载的文档、图形等成果物；通过Actions与模型上下文协议（MCP）使智能体能与外部应用交互，并提供灵活的认证选项；具备在沙箱中执行代码以分析数据、渲染图表或修改文件的能力；支持通过文本转语音和语音转文本进行语音对话；以及能根据用户提示生成图像。，在部署与集成方面，Onyx开箱即用提供了超过50种基于索引的连接器，并支持通过MCP扩展，方便用户连接各类应用程序。平台部署简便，可通过单行命令快速安装。该项目在GitHub上获得了广泛关注，拥有大量星标，显示出活跃的开发者社区。

title: dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim - The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS
content: GitHub - dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim: The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Dismiss alert dmtrKovalenko / fff.nvim Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 117 Star 3k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 185 Commits 185 Commits .cargo .cargo .github/ workflows .github/ workflows crates crates doc doc lua lua packages packages plugin plugin scripts scripts tests tests .gitignore .gitignore .luacheckrc .luacheckrc .luarc.ci.json .luarc.ci.json .luarc.json .luarc.json .mcp.json .mcp.json .nixignore .nixignore .stylua.toml .stylua.toml Cargo.lock Cargo.lock Cargo.toml Cargo.toml LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile README.md README.md _typos.toml _typos.toml biome.json biome.json bun.lock bun.lock chart.png chart.png empty_config.lua empty_config.lua flake.lock flake.lock flake.nix flake.nix install-mcp.sh install-mcp.sh package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json rust-toolchain.toml rust-toolchain.toml View all files Repository files navigation FFF AI agents (MCP) | Neovim users A fast file search for your AI and neovim, with memory built-in FFF stands for freakin fast fuzzy file finder (pick 3) and it is an opinionated fuzzy file picker for your AI agent and Neovim. Just for file search, but we do the file search really fff well. FFF is a tool for grepping, fuzzy file matching, globbing, and multigrepping with a strong focus on performance and useful search results. For humans - provides an unbelievable typo-resistant experience, for AI agents - implements the fastest file search with additional free memory suggesting the best search results based on various factors like frecency, git status, file size, definition matches, and more. MCP FFF is an amazing way to reduce the time and tokens by giving your AI agent a bit of memory built-in to their file search tools. It makes your AI harness to find the code faster and spend less tokens by doing less roundtrips and reading less useless files. You can install FFF as a dependency for your AI agent using a simple bash script: curl -L https://dmtrkovalenko.dev/install-fff-mcp.sh | bash The installation script is here ./install-mcp.sh if you want to review it before running. It will print out the instructions on how to connect it to your Claude Code , Codex , OpenCode , etc. Once you have it connected just ask your agent to "use fff". Here is an example addition to CLAUDE.md that works perfectly: # CLAUDE.md For any file search or grep in the current git indexed directory use fff tools Neovim guide Here is some demo on the linux repository (100k f
title_zh: dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim - 面向AI代理、Neovim、Rust、C和NodeJS的最快最准确文件搜索工具包
summary_zh: 开发者 dmtrKovalenko 在 GitHub 上发布了 fff.nvim 项目，这是一个专为 AI 代理、Neovim、Rust、C 和 NodeJS 设计的最快、最准确的文件搜索工具包。FFF 代表“freakin fast fuzzy file finder”，是一个专注于高性能和实用搜索结果的模糊文件选择器。，该工具的核心功能包括文件内容搜索（grep）、模糊文件匹配、通配符匹配（globbing）以及多重搜索（multigrepping）。其突出特点是极致的速度和准确性。对于人类用户，它提供了难以置信的容错体验；对于 AI 代理，它实现了最快的文件搜索，并内置了“记忆”功能，能够根据多种因素（如访问频率、git 状态、文件大小、定义匹配等）智能推荐最佳搜索结果，从而减少 AI 的往返查询次数和令牌消耗。，FFF 通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）与 AI 代理集成，可以显著提升 AI 编码助手（如 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode 等）在代码库中查找文件的效率。用户可以通过运行提供的 bash 脚本轻松安装，并将其配置到 AI 代理中。安装后，AI 代理即可利用 FFF 的工具进行快速文件定位。，对于 Neovim 用户，FFF 可直接作为插件集成，提供高效的文件选取体验。项目展示了在大型代码库（如 Linux 内核仓库，包含约 10 万个文件）中进行搜索的演示，凸显了其处理大规模项目的性能优势。，总之，fff.nvim 是一个旨在优化开发者和 AI 工作流的专业工具，通过结合速度、准确性和智能记忆，成为文件搜索领域的一个强大解决方案。
